meta.northy_message: Sunday morning, 3am CT. G-Brain is back. The five urgent items haven't changed — but Monday is tomorrow. Garland ($140K) closes in 24 hours. ESC-10 is two days overdue. Target contradiction unresolved. And mcp.publish_skills is still false — Zig, Atlas, the whole fleet blocked behind one config flag. This is the 5th scan on that. 60 seconds, Steve.

act_now.title: Zig's Pipeline BLOCKED — mcp.publish_skills Is Still False. 5th Scan. Fix This NOW.
act_now.detail: Steve granted Zig merge_or_release (permissions) on Friday. But Zig still can't reach HubSpot because mcp.publish_skills is false. Live HubSpot data from Saturday evening: Holliday ISD renewal modified, Port Arthur ISD moved, Santa Anna ISD renewal created. Pipeline is alive. Zig is blind. Two June closed-won deals ($6,192) banked. Monday weekly report won't run. This also blocks Atlas (6th ask for HubSpot token), Sentinel flagged RED, and Dewey's media-to-CRM pipeline.
act_now.action: Run: gbrain config set mcp.publish_skills true. Reply to Zig's BLOCKED post: 'Unblocked. Retry.' 60 seconds.

act_now.title: Garland $140K — Monday Is TOMORROW. ONE Day. Moak Casey Lever Still Available.
act_now.detail: June 30 deadline. No evidence Jodi Duron's intro email to Dr. Rick Lopez was sent. She agreed in May. Michael Ruiz debrief happened. Nobody followed up. HubSpot last activity Thursday — no Friday or Saturday movement. Deal is going cold.
act_now.action: DM Jodi Duron today: 'Jodi — Michael's been hard to reach and Garland's quote deadline is Monday. I'd love you to put in the word with Dr. Lopez.'

act_now.title: CONTRADICTION: Zig's Target Is $1.5M/Aug 1. Yours Is $1M/Sept 1. Resolve Before Monday Morning.
act_now.detail: 5th scan unresolved since June 25. Zig's Monday weekly runs against the wrong number. Jan and Teela follow Zig's lead. Weekend window closing.
act_now.action: Post in #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Canonical target is $1M ARR by Sept 1. Zig, run reports against that.' Or confirm $1.5M/Aug 1 is real.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — Two Days Overdue. No Confirmation of Submission.
act_now.detail: Deadline was Friday June 27. It's now Sunday June 29. If sent: kill this item. If not: send it today. July 29 follow-up gives recovery time.
act_now.action: Send whatever exists today OR confirm it was sent Friday.
